question: H2 / FB-independence of auto-core-hit rate: does Little Mermaid's SMG NORMAL core-hit fraction depend on Full-Burst state, or is it pure aim geometry? Tested WITHIN ONE UNIT, SAME range band, in one video to avoid a unit confound.

params.focusReason: LM-focused control comp (has full bursts, unlike solos) — clean same-unit same-band in-FB vs out-FB discriminator

fightClockField: top-right 03:00 countdown; at video t=48 clock=02:20 => 40s elapsed => fightStart=8s
method: ffmpeg 60fps crosshair-region extraction + zoomed 2x2 montages (crop~540:320@1020,220 scaled 2x). Popups classified STRUCTURALLY by red 'CORE HIT' text and by VALUE ANCHOR (self-consistent across conditions). All popups attributable to LM only (LM-focused footage). Independent frames sampled >=0.7-1.0s apart (popup lifetime ~0.6s) to avoid double-counting. Core counted = red 'CORE HIT' number; non-core = white body + orange crit. DoT sub-hits (337736 white / 450314 orange), skill/ambiguous (453086, 386024), barrage (millions), cyan Crown-shield numbers, and green Helm heals all EXCLUDED.
R3_corePlusCritRendering: CONFIRMED. Core+crit renders as RED 'CORE HIT' text + RED number + orange crit arrow (e.g. in-FB 136658 at t=50.6/51.6/65.4; out-FB 71332 at t=40.5). Plain core body-hit also RED 'CORE HIT'. Distinguished from the persistent RED core-RETICLE graphic (a fixed aim-point circle/X, not a popup) and from orange crit numbers (crit non-core).

core_over_body_ratio.note: ~2.13 both — validates the core anchor across conditions

crit_over_body_ratio.note: FB compresses the crit factor (base major already ~1.5 in-FB), per the owner colour convention — validates classification

fbMap_video_s.note: FB countdown is a 10.00->0 top-centre timer. Cadence ~14s. FB1/FB2 fully NEAR band (fight 33-70s = video 41-78s); FB3 tail crosses into far at fight 70s.

band: near (fight 33-70s). BOSS_RANGE_SCRIPT sim.ts:129. Both in-FB and out-FB samples are in the SAME near band. NOTE: SMG is NOT range-eligible in near band (only SG), so the +30% range bonus is OFF in BOTH conditions — range confound is controlled.

inFB.note: boss obscured by FB effect; no readable normals
453086 skill x2 excl; no normals readable

decision: Both pre-committed criteria met: (1) 95% CIs overlap heavily ([6.1,28.7] vs [5.9,24.7]); (2) |Delta| = 1.4pp << 10pp. LM's SMG normal core-hit rate does NOT depend on Full-Burst state -> core is aim geometry; per-band core rates apply regardless of FB. No flag.
confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH for the verdict (the two conditions land ~1.4pp apart with massively overlapping CIs; the crowding bias, if anything, is WORSE in-FB — DoT/barrage clutter hides more cores in-FB — so any true effect would push in-FB LOWER, not create a >10pp gap). MEDIUM for the absolute rate.
sideFinding: ABSOLUTE core rate for LM's SMG in the near band measured ~12-14% here, FAR below the engine's AUTO_CORE_RATE ~0.85 (sim.ts). This is the near-band, close-boss geometry with SMG spread mostly hitting body (white 33119/64733) not core. Relevant to open-questions A9 (AUTO_CORE_RATE weakly sourced, weapon/range dependent). NOTE: this is an incidental single-band read, NOT a core-rate refit — recorded for A9 follow-up only.
attributionNotes: LM-focused footage => every popup is LM's (ground rule). Excluded by value/colour: DoT sub-hits (white 337736 / orange 450314, in-FB only), skill/ambiguous large whites (453086, 386024, 84070/484070 post-FB residue), barrage (millions), cyan Crown-shield boss hits, green Helm-B3 heals (over character). The red core-RETICLE graphic on the boss weakpoint is NOT a popup and was not counted.
savedFrames: scratchpad/z_506.png (R3 evidence: CORE HIT 136658 core+crit rendering)
